summary: 0.6.64 is a narrow fix for the new default-preset startup seam: keep the 0.6.63 plugin UI, but persist the default-preset startup state in plugin data and stop the startup probe from expiring before the attached player is ready.
operatorSignals: 0.6.63 looked good overall, but Load Default at Start did not actually apply reliably.
The operator explicitly suspected plugin-pref persistence because generated dev scenes should not be the only storage seam for a default preset.
The requested change was narrow and should not reopen the transport or panel layout work.
actionsTaken: Added a tiny plugin-data preference seam for the default preset id and Load Default at Start flag.
Changed the startup probe so it stays armed until the attached player is truly ready instead of expiring after an early fixed timeout.
Left the 0.6.63 plugin UI, transport, and demo3 behavior untouched.
nonGoals: No slideshow, sync, right-stick volume, gaze, or transport changes in this slice.
No further plugin UI redesign beyond the already-shipped 0.6.63 layout.
